name: Stream Rewrite & Deduparr
description: Bulk URL replacement for all stored streams plus duplicate cleanup using M3U source priority.
author: alxgarci

fields.label: Run one or both operations: URL replacement and duplicate cleanup.
M3U priority order
fields.placeholder:
Provider A
Provider B
Provider C
fields.help_text: One M3U source name per line. Earlier entries have higher priority when duplicates are removed.

fields.label: Only process these M3Us
fields.help_text: Optional allowlist. Leave empty to process all M3U sources.

fields.label: Dry run mode
fields.help_text: Preview only. No DB writes are performed.

actions.label: Validate settings
actions.description: Check model compatibility, M3U names and cron expressions.

confirm.title: Run plugin?
confirm.message: This may rewrite URLs and merge/delete duplicate streams.

confirm.title: Clear lock?
confirm.message: Only do this if nothing is currently running.
